data.description:

An update from Huntington Bancshares ( (HBAN) ) is now available.

On April 23, 2026, Huntington Bancshares announced that its board declared a quarterly cash dividend on its common stock of $0.155 per share, unchanged from the previous quarter, payable on July 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of June 17. The company also approved quarterly dividends across seven preferred stock series, with most to be paid on July 15, 2026, and the Series L dividend scheduled for August 20, 2026, underscoring a continued commitment to returning capital to both common and preferred shareholders.

The preferred dividends cover its floating-rate Series B and fixed-rate reset Series F, G, H, J, K, and L issues, with record dates in early July and August depending on the series. By maintaining its common dividend level and fulfilling obligations on a wide slate of preferred securities, Huntington signaled ongoing balance-sheet stability and consistent income for income-focused investors in its capital structure.

The most recent analyst rating on (HBAN) stock is a Hold with a $18.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Huntington Bancshares stock, see the HBAN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HBAN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HBAN is a Neutral.

The score is supported by solid underlying financial performance and favorable valuation (low P/E and strong dividend yield), alongside upbeat 2026 growth guidance. These positives are tempered by weak technicals (downtrend and negative momentum) and execution risk from integrating Cadence and managing a higher expense base and CRE-related criticized assets.

To see Spark’s full report on HBAN stock, click here.

More about Huntington Bancshares

Huntington Bancshares Incorporated is a $285 billion-asset regional bank holding company headquartered in Columbus, Ohio. Through The Huntington National Bank and its affiliates, it offers a broad range of banking, payments, wealth management, and risk management services to consumers, small and middle-market businesses, corporations, and public-sector clients across more than 1,400 branches in 21 states.

data.title: Ameris Bancorp Posts Strong First-Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ameris Bancorp ( (ABCB) ) has shared an announcement.

Ameris Bancorp reported a strong first quarter of 2026, with net income rising to $110.5 million, or $1.63 per diluted share, for the period ended March 31, 2026, up from $87.9 million a year earlier, driven by higher net interest income and robust noninterest revenue. Return on average assets reached 1.62%, return on average tangible common equity climbed to 14.75% and net interest margin expanded to 3.88%, underscoring outperformance versus much of the regional banking sector.

Earning assets grew by $607.8 million on an annualized basis, supported by $314.5 million in loan growth and $260.7 million in deposit growth, while the noninterest-bearing deposit mix improved to 29.8% of total deposits, helping reduce the total cost of funds to 1.88%. The efficiency ratio improved year over year to 49.97% despite seasonal expense pressures, credit quality remained solid with annualized net charge-offs of 0.21% and stable reserves and the company returned capital by repurchasing about $74.9 million of stock, or roughly 1.4% of outstanding equity, while growing tangible book value per share to $44.79.

Noninterest income increased 13.1% from the prior quarter to $69.9 million, with mortgage banking revenue up 16.1% and other fee income helped by the absence of prior mortgage servicing right losses and higher gains on SBA loan sales. Total assets reached $28.11 billion, shareholders’ equity stood at $4.08 billion and tangible common equity represented 11.15% of tangible assets, positioning Ameris with a stronger balance sheet and capital base as it continues to expand in its Southeast markets.

The most recent analyst rating on (ABCB) stock is a Hold with a $85.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ameris Bancorp stock, see the ABCB Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ABCB Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ABCB is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid fundamentals (profitability and a strong, conservatively levered balance sheet), partially offset by cash flow volatility. Earnings-call guidance and sentiment were constructive, while technicals are mixed and valuation is reasonable but not especially supported by yield.

To see Spark’s full report on ABCB stock, click here.

More about Ameris Bancorp

Ameris Bancorp is a regional financial services company and bank holding company for Ameris Bank, operating primarily across attractive markets in the U.S. Southeast. The company offers a range of banking products, including commercial and consumer loans, deposit accounts and treasury services, as well as a sizable retail mortgage business and SBA lending platform that contribute meaningfully to fee income and balance-sheet growth.

The bank focuses on profitable franchise expansion in its core Southeast footprint, emphasizing a strong mix of noninterest-bearing deposits and disciplined credit underwriting. Management highlights operating efficiency and net interest margin performance as key differentiators versus peers, supporting returns on tangible common equity that outpace much of the broader regional banking industry.

Average Trading Volume: 572,571

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: $5.77B

The latest announcement is out from IQVIA Holdings ( (IQV) ).

On April 23, 2026, IQVIA Holdings Inc. stockholders approved a new 2026 Incentive and Stock Award Plan at the company’s annual meeting, replacing the 2017 plan and authorizing a broad mix of performance- and time-based equity awards, including options, stock appreciation rights, restricted stock and units. The Leadership Development and Compensation Committee also adopted new standard award agreements, with performance shares tied to metrics such as revenue, adjusted EBITDA, earnings per share, cash flow and relative total shareholder return, reinforcing IQVIA’s equity-based pay framework for employees and executives.

Oceanfirst Financial ( (OCFC) ) has shared an announcement.

OceanFirst Financial Corp. reported first-quarter 2026 net income available to common stockholders of $20.5 million, or $0.36 per diluted share, flat versus a year earlier but up from $13.1 million, or $0.23, in the fourth quarter of 2025. Core earnings rose to $24.3 million, or $0.43 per diluted share, while core pre-tax, pre-provision earnings increased to $34.4 million, reflecting improved returns on assets and tangible equity.

The quarter, which ended March 31, 2026, was marked by a six-basis-point expansion in net interest margin to 2.93%, $1.2 million growth in net interest income to $96.4 million, and a 13% reduction in non-interest expense to $73.4 million. Total loans grew $91.9 million at a 3% annualized rate, led by robust commercial and industrial lending, as management highlighted strong results from loan growth, margin expansion, and cost control while progressing toward a pending merger with Flushing Financial Corporation, which has secured key approvals but is still awaiting final regulatory clearance.

data.description:

Happy City Holdings Limited Class A ( (HCHL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On April 21, 2026, Happy City Holdings Limited signed a Standby Equity Purchase Agreement with YA II PN, Ltd., giving the company the right, but not the obligation, to sell up to $20 million of its Class A ordinary shares over 36 months. The purchase price per share will be based on the lowest daily volume‑weighted average price over three trading days following each drawdown notice, with no mandatory minimum advances or non‑usage fees.

Happy City has already paid a $25,000 structuring fee and issued 72,401 Class A shares as half of the commitment fee, with the remaining $100,000 to be paid in cash at the first advance closing. Share sales under the facility can only begin once a resale registration statement becomes effective, positioning the company with flexible, on‑demand equity financing that may support future capital needs while subject to ownership and registration limits designed to manage dilution and regulatory compliance.

On April 23, 2026, Castellum, Inc., a cybersecurity, electronic warfare, and software services provider to the federal government, announced it had achieved Cybersecurity Maturity Model Certification Level 2 following a comprehensive assessment by an accredited C3PAO. The certification confirms that Castellum and its subsidiaries meet advanced requirements for protecting Controlled Unclassified Information in support of U.S. Department of Defense programs.

Executives said the company achieved a perfect Level 2 score with all 110 controls and 320 objectives met and no open remediation items, underscoring the strength of its security posture and processes. data.description:

Workhorse Group ( (WKHS) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 17, 2026, Workhorse Group Inc. entered into a binding settlement term sheet with Coulomb Solutions, Inc. to resolve a previously disclosed lawsuit in the U.S. District Court for the Eastern District of Michigan. Under the agreement, the litigation will be dismissed with prejudice in exchange for Workhorse paying $4.3 million, contingent on finalizing a definitive settlement by April 30, 2026 and funding the payment by May 28, 2026.

Workhorse plans to finance the $4.3 million settlement through borrowing under its existing credit facilities, which will increase its debt load but remove ongoing legal uncertainty. The resolution of the dispute is expected to eliminate potential litigation risk and associated costs, clarifying the company’s financial obligations and allowing management to focus more fully on core operations and strategic initiatives.

data.title: Nexera Technologies’ KeepZone AI Signs White Label Deal for Voice-Based Security Decision System
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Nexera Technologies ( (NEXR) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 20, 2026, Nexera Technologies announced that its wholly owned subsidiary KeepZone AI entered a strategic white label agreement with a third-party technology provider to develop an AI-powered real-time voice communication decision support system. The system will be integrated, customized and rebranded under the KeepZone name for global deployment, expanding Nexera’s footprint in advanced homeland security technologies.

The planned platform is designed to process multiple voice and radio channels simultaneously, automatically detect potential events, evaluate risk and provide real-time operational insights in high-intensity settings such as defense, homeland security, emergency response and critical infrastructure operations. KeepZone intends to offer the solution as a proprietary product within its AI-based homeland security portfolio, a move management views as a key step in broadening capabilities and positioning its technology as a core component of next-generation command and control decision support systems.

The April 23, 2026 Form 6-K filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission formally furnished this April 20 press release and links the announcement into Nexera’s existing shelf registration framework. By routing the deal disclosure through its SEC filings, Nexera underscores the strategic nature of the agreement for investors, reinforcing its transition from a pure-play Amazon seller into a dual-focus business combining legacy e-commerce operations with AI-driven security and defense solutions.

More about Nexera Technologies

Nexera Technologies Ltd, formerly Jeffs’ Brands Ltd, is a data-driven company that operates both in e-commerce, primarily via the Amazon Marketplace, and in advanced technologies for the global homeland security sector. Through subsidiaries such as KeepZone, it focuses on AI-powered security solutions including 3D imaging, electromagnetic threat detection, perimeter intrusion systems, counter‑UAS tools and multi-layered security for critical infrastructure and global markets.

The company also maintains legacy e-commerce operations via units like Smart Repair Pro and Top Rank and holds a controlling interest in Fort Products’ pest control and remedial product business, which was sold to Fort Technology Inc. in July 2025. Nexera continues to leverage its data-driven retail expertise while expanding into AI-based defense and homeland security solutions as a core strategic growth area.

Average Trading Volume: 111,517

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $1.4M

Learn more about NEXR stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Teck Resources Posts Record Copper Sales and Strong Q1 2026 Results as Anglo American Merger Advances
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Teck Resources ( ($TSE:TECK.B) ) has shared an announcement.

Teck Resources reported unaudited first-quarter 2026 results on April 22, posting a sharp rebound in profitability driven by record quarterly copper sales, higher commodity prices and stronger by-product revenues. Revenue rose to C$3.94 billion from C$2.29 billion a year earlier, adjusted EBITDA more than doubled to C$2.09 billion, and adjusted profit attributable to shareholders nearly tripled to C$858 million, supported by a copper segment gross profit before depreciation and amortization of C$1.8 billion and a zinc segment contribution of C$387 million.

QB copper sales reached a record 70,300 tonnes in Q1 2026, materially exceeding production of 55,500 tonnes as inventories were drawn down, while production remained stable despite a planned maintenance shutdown and a shorter February, underscoring improving operational stability. Teck also highlighted progress toward completing its previously approved merger of equals with Anglo American to form Anglo Teck, which is intended to create a Canada-headquartered critical minerals major with enhanced resilience and long-term copper growth potential, while maintaining strong liquidity of C$9.8 billion and a low high-potential incident frequency rate of 0.05 in the quarter.

The most recent analyst rating on ($TSE:TECK.B) stock is a Hold with a C$78.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Teck Resources stock, see the TSE:TECK.B Stock Forecast page.

The latest earnings call was constructive with strong Q1 results and reaffirmed guidance, though execution and cost risks remain.

Meridian Bank ( (MRBK) ) has provided an update.

Meridian Corporation reported first-quarter 2026 net income of $4.7 million, or $0.39 per diluted share, issued on April 23, 2026, down 34% from the prior quarter but nearly double the $2.4 million earned a year earlier. Pre-provision net revenue rose about 20% year over year to $10.1 million, supported by an improved net interest margin of 3.82% as deposit repricing and mix shifts bolstered profitability despite lower loan yields and a modest 1% rise in commercial loans.

The company’s returns on average assets and equity reached 0.74% and 9.44%, respectively, while total assets were stable at $2.6 billion and capital and tangible book value continued to strengthen. Credit costs remained elevated due to charge-offs in SBA and leasing loans originated in 2020–2021, but management highlighted active remediation efforts and government guarantees on more than half of nonperforming SBA balances, and the board declared a quarterly dividend of $0.14 per share payable May 11, 2026 to shareholders of record on May 4, 2026.

data.title: Ecopetrol Moves for Control Stake in Brazil’s Brava Energia With Premium Tender Offer
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Ecopetrol SA ( (EC) ) has issued an update.

On April 23, 2026, Ecopetrol S.A. signed a share purchase agreement with key shareholders of Brazil’s Brava Energia S.A. to acquire 120,813,490 shares, or about 26% of Brava’s capital, marking a major expansion of its Brazilian upstream, midstream and downstream footprint. Brava, formed in 2024 via the merger of 3R Petroleum Óleo e Gás and Enauta Participações, is Brazil’s second-largest listed independent oil and gas company by reserves and production and reported 2025 EBITDA of $806 million with a 39% margin.

Completion of the deal is subject to regulatory and contractual approvals and to Ecopetrol ultimately securing a 51% controlling stake in Brava through a voluntary tender offer on the B3 at R$23.00 per share, a roughly 27.8% premium to the 90-day VWAP, financed via a planned bridge loan. If finalized, Ecopetrol would add pro-rata 1P reserves from Brava’s 459 MMboe and immediate production from its 2025 average of 81,000 boe/d, reinforcing the group’s long-term 2040 strategy, boosting metrics such as ROACE and EBITDA, and further diversifying its asset base in a high-growth Brazilian market where it already operates.

The most recent analyst rating on (EC) stock is a Hold with a $13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Ecopetrol SA stock, see the EC Stock Forecast page.

More about Ecopetrol SA

Ecopetrol S.A. is the largest company in Colombia and one of the main integrated energy groups in the Americas, active across exploration and production, transportation, logistics, refining, petrochemicals and gas distribution. It also controls a majority stake in ISA, giving it significant positions in power transmission, real-time system management, road concessions and telecommunications across Brazil, Chile, Peru, Bolivia and Chile, alongside upstream interests in the United States, Brazil and Mexico.

The latest update is out from VivoPower ( (VIVO) ).

On April 23, 2026, VivoPower said it has begun a competitive request-for-proposals process to lease capacity at the 41.5MW Mo i Rana data center in northern Norway, days after closing the acquisition on April 21. The fully operational facility, powered by low-cost renewable hydroelectricity and located in a cold Nordic climate, has drawn strong interest from AI neocloud operators and hyperscalers and can potentially be expanded to more than 80MW, subject to regulatory approval.

Management, supported by external advisers, will assess potential tenants on commercial terms, credit strength, operational fit with the site and alignment with VivoPower’s sovereign AI infrastructure strategy, including options for future capacity growth. The company expects new tenant agreements to enhance the economics of the Mo i Rana asset, which currently generates about $31 million in annual revenue and $10 million in EBITDA, strengthening VivoPower’s positioning in the fast-growing AI data center market while leveraging its Power-to-X model and ultra-low power costs.

data.title: Grace Therapeutics Receives FDA Complete Response for GTx-104
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An announcement from Grace Therapeutics ( (GRCE) ) is now available.

On April 23, 2026, Grace Therapeutics reported that the U.S. Food and Drug Administration issued a Complete Response Letter for its New Drug Application for GTx-104, an IV formulation of nimodipine for aneurysmal subarachnoid hemorrhage. The FDA cited outstanding chemistry, manufacturing and controls and non-clinical issues, including leachables data, toxicology risk assessments and deficiencies at a contract manufacturer, but did not request additional clinical data.

Grace said it plans to seek a Type A meeting and resubmit the application after addressing the cited items, a process that could delay potential approval of what it views as the first major advance in aSAH care in more than four decades. The update follows positive Phase 3 STRIVE-ON trial results, where GTx-104 reduced clinically significant hypotension versus oral nimodipine and showed favorable dosing intensity, functional outcomes and ICU resource use with comparable overall safety, underscoring the drug’s clinical rationale despite the regulatory setback.

The most recent analyst rating on (GRCE) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Grace Therapeutics stock, see the GRCE Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on GRCE Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, GRCE is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance driven by pre-revenue status, ongoing losses, and persistent cash burn, despite a low-debt balance sheet. Technicals are also soft with the price below key moving averages and weak momentum. Valuation contributes little support because earnings are negative and no dividend yield is provided.

To see Spark’s full report on GRCE stock, click here.

More about Grace Therapeutics

Grace Therapeutics, Inc. is a late-stage biopharma company focused on drug candidates for rare and orphan diseases, using novel drug delivery technologies to improve the performance of existing therapies. Its lead asset, GTx-104, is an intravenous nimodipine formulation targeting aneurysmal subarachnoid hemorrhage, and its programs benefit from Orphan Drug Designation and a broad patent estate.
